articles.title: Scientists Just Discovered A Way To Reverse Aging Using Electricity - bgr.com
articles.description: Researchers based out of Stanford have demonstrated an electricity-based anti-aging technique on sea squirts that looks suspiciously like exercise.
articles.content: There have been a number of strong claims in the field of anti-aging recently, from supplements said to extend human life to a drug that extends the lifespan of mice by up to 30%. Now, a new study pu… [+1225 chars]
